title: Anesthesia Program Learning Outcomes
content:
Anesthesia Program Learning Outcomes

Program Learning Outcomes

1.

Based on the competences gained at secondary level, the course has theoretical and practical knowledge at the basic level supported by textbooks, application tools and other resources with current information in the field of Anesthesia Techniques.

2. The basic scientific knowledge in the field of Anesthesia Technique has knowledge of reaching, evaluating and applying.

3. Interprets and evaluates data using the basic knowledge and skills acquired in the field of Anesthesia Technique, identifies, analyzes and takes responsibility/takes responsibility for the planned studies for solution.

4. Using an accumulation of basic knowledge about the field of Anesthesia Technique, it executes an assigned task independently.

5. She works as a team member to solve complicated problems encountered and unpredictable in applications related to the field of Anesthesia Technique.

6. Informs the relevant people and institutions by using the basic knowledge and skills in the field of Anesthesia Technician.

7. It shares ideas with the experts about the field of Anesthesia Technique and proposals for solutions to problems.

8. In the field of Anesthesia Techniques, it monitors the events of the society and the world's agenda and is sensitive to developments.

9. Scientific, cultural and ethical values in the stages of collecting, interpreting, implementing and reporting the results of the Anesthesia Technique field.

10. The individual and the public have adequate consensus on health, environmental protection and work safety.

11. It is an example of gathering with external appearance, attitude, attitude and behavior.
